summary: Verified BoostPC preset-fix in PowerShell agent script and all requested backend/frontend flows. 12/12 backend tests pass. Frontend testids and GPU tabs work; benchmark card renders after test data injection.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/pc.py uses env var FRONTEND_URL as backend URL passed to the agent script (line 116) - naming is misleading (should be BACKEND_URL). Works but confusing.
ps_agent.py is a 580-line embedded here-string; consider splitting into templated files for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all testids present, tabs clickable, benchmark card renders)

seed_data_creation: Inserted a benchmark record via POST /api/agent/report-specs (before overall=500, after overall=650) which is now the latest benchmark for admin user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GUI WinForms not runnable on Linux; preset fix validated only by inspecting the served PS script content. Test file test_agent_script.py checks: no GetNewClosure, presence of $this.Tag, TabControl, script:PRESETS, competitivo/streaming/completo, placeholders substituted, and benchmark round-trip.
rca of the issue: N/A - fix already applied and verified. New-Preset now sets $b.Tag=$key and handler reads $this.Tag instead of using .GetNewClosure() which broke $script: variable references.
